content.rendered: Raj serves as the General Manager of the AI Infrastructure Group at AMI, overseeing the development and deployment of advanced firmware solutions that power AI and high-performance computing systems. With a deep focus on innovation, reliability, and performance, Raj drives strategy and business execution of firmware technologies that optimize AI infrastructure for efficiency, scalability, and security. Raj is also responsible for AMI’s strategic evolution of engineering processes, tools, culture, and capabilities to drive innovation, efficiency, and competitiveness. He holds a BS from Karnataka University and an MBA from Georgia State University.
